= re_find_all




== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `pattern`
| `string`
| The pattern to match against.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.matches = this.value.re_find_all("a.")

# In:  {"value":"paranormal"}
# Out: {"matches":["ar","an","al"]}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.numbers = this.text.re_find_all("[0-9]+")

# In:  {"text":"I have 2 apples and 15 oranges"}
# Out: {"numbers":["2","15"]}
----
